overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a high-fidelity video game showing the player entering a large gothic-style classroom or great hall with wooden beams and stone walls. The player opens an ornate wooden door, walks through the space observing students in robes seated at wooden benches, and ends with a static view from the rear of the room.

events.description: ornate wooden door swings open revealing the grand hall interior
steps across the threshold from the doorway into the main hall

agents.ego_description: opening the carved wooden door and stepping into the gothic classroom hall

entered.detail: dark carved wooden door with diamond patterns and brass handle
dark wooden balustrade along the right side entrance
ornate blue and gold circular rug on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The scene begins with a close-up of an ornate carved wooden door which opens to reveal a grand gothic classroom. The camera moves through the doorway, passing from the dimly lit entrance into a larger hall with wooden railings and a decorative blue rug visible on the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic classroom with tiered wooden seating

events.description: turns left to approach the central aisle between wooden benches
turns right to walk along the side wall with inscribed stone panels
turns to face the rear of the classroom, completing a circuit of the room

agents.ego_description: walking through the classroom observing the architecture and students seated at desks

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes ascending the wooden staircase on the left
student sitting at wooden desk reading a book

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with carved railings leading to an upper level
elaborate black iron chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling
tall narrow gothic windows with stone tracery letting in natural light
long wooden benches and desks arranged in rows facing the front
wall covered with carved latin inscriptions and text panels
large wooden desk at the front of the classroom with books and artifacts

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the spacious gothic classroom, passing wooden benches where students in dark robes sit studying. The room features high vaulted ceilings with iron chandeliers, tall gothic windows, and walls covered in carved inscriptions. The player walks along the side wall, observing the detailed architecture and scattered students before turning toward the rear of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear of classroom overlooking student seating area

events.description: comes to a complete stop at the back of the classroom

agents.ego_description: standing still at the rear of the classroom observing the students and front instructor area

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes writing at a desk in the foreground
instructor figure standing near the front desk

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary at the back of the classroom, providing a stable view of the gothic hall. Students continue sitting at their wooden benches facing the front, where an instructor stands near the large desk. The iron chandelier hangs prominently in the center of the frame, and the tall windows continue to cast natural light across the wooden floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, dimly lit entrance into the expansive, light-filled interior of a grand gothic classroom. It begins with a close-up of an ornate carved wooden door that opens to reveal a large hall, with the camera gliding past wooden railings and across a decorative blue rug. As the camera advances through the space, the view expands to show students in dark robes seated at wooden benches beneath high vaulted ceilings and iron chandeliers, while the walls shift from the simple doorway to surfaces covered in carved inscriptions. The movement then follows the side wall, observing the detailed architecture and tall gothic windows before turning toward the rear of the room. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at the back of the hall, settling into a stationary view of the instructor at the front desk and the natural light casting across the wooden floor.
